tasks.subject: Create InvoiceController with index
tasks.description: Implement InvoiceController.php with index() per FR-004/005: role-based filtering with clientId, status, month, year filters.

tasks.subject: Implement invoice sync endpoint
tasks.description: Add sync() to InvoiceController per FR-001/002/003/006: fetch from PacoTicket, match by pacoticketId, upsert by pacoticketRef, handle failure gracefully.
tasks.evidence: Added sync() with PacoTicket fetch, client match by pacoticketId, ON CONFLICT upsert

tasks.subject: Register invoice routes in index.php
tasks.description: Add 2 invoice routes to backend/public/index.php: GET /invoices [auth], POST /invoices/sync [superadmin].
